page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage how you sign in to Frank.

account.heading: Account
account.emailHint: Your sign-in link is sent to this address.

passwordReset.heading: Reset sign-in link
passwordReset.body: Tenant accounts sign in with a one-time magic link. If you've lost access on this device, send yourself a fresh link to your email and use it to sign in again.
passwordReset.cta: Email me a fresh sign-in link
passwordReset.sent: Check your email. A fresh sign-in link is on its way to {{email}}.

errors.rateLimited: You've requested too many links. Try again in a minute.
errors.generic: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.
